title: Implement tk merge-activity JSONL driver
description:
Create a real merge driver for .tick/activity/activity.jsonl that replaces the weak merge=union approach.

Files to create/modify:
- NEW internal/merge/activity.go — MergeActivity(ancestor, current, other io.Reader, out io.Writer) error
  - Parse all three sides as JSONL (one JSON object per line)
  - Dedup union: include a line if its (ts + tick_id + action + actor) key appears in either current or other
  - Sort output by ts (ascending)
  - Strip any lines that contain '<<<<<<<', '=======', or '>>>>>>>' (committed conflict markers)
  - Write to out
- NEW cmd/tk/cmd/mergeactivity.go — 'tk merge-activity %O %A %B %P' command wiring
  - Same signature pattern as mergefile.go: opens the three temp files, calls merge.MergeActivity, writes result to %A (the current file)
- cmd/tk/main.go — add 'merge-activity' to the switch case and printUsage list

Test in internal/merge/ covering:
- Basic union (lines from both sides survive)
- Dedup (same event on both sides appears once)
- Sort by ts (out-of-order input → sorted output)
- Conflict-marker stripping (<<<, ===, >>> lines removed)
- Empty sides (one side empty → other side's lines)

Run: go test ./internal/merge/... ./cmd/tk/cmd/...
acceptance_criteria: go test ./internal/merge/... passes with all 5 test cases; tk merge-activity --help works; go vet ./... clean
